title: heleniastrum elegans
intro: Heleniastrum elegans, also known as Huang-qin or Sophora flavescens, is a flowering plant native to Asia, commonly used in traditional Chinese medicine. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Heleniastrum elegans include reducing fever, soothing sore throats, and alleviating digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the roots and flowers of the plant are often dried and made into teas, capsules, or infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
